title: Happy Holidays from Pixaroma 🎵 A Song to Warm Your Heart
description:
🎄 Happy Holidays from Pixaroma! 🎄
Pixaroma is wishing you a magical holiday season with this special song, created just for you using AI tools like Kling AI, ChatGPT, Flux Dev with ComfyUI, CapCut, and Suno AI.

This festive video features an angel singing, the Pixaroma truck delivering gifts, and many more heartwarming scenes.

We hope this song brings you joy and adds a little magic to your holidays. Enjoy!

Free workflows are available on the Pixaroma Discord server in the pixaroma-workflows channel https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3

You can now support the channel and unlock exclusive perks by becoming a member:
pixaroma https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCmMbwA-s3GZDKVzGZ-kPwaQ/join

Check my other channels: 
https://www.youtube.com/@AltFlux
https://www.youtube.com/@AI2Play

#HappyHolidays #Pixaroma #AISong #HolidayGreetings
transcript: The magic here is here, the season is begun  Pixel Rome, up rings cheer to everyone  Pixel Rome is here to spread some cheer  Wishing you peace and love this year  A season of joy, so warm and bright  Happy holidays, a peaceful night  Happy holidays, a peaceful night  Let's share the magic, the holiday light  With hearts so happy, shining so bright  Wishing you moments full of delight  Happy holidays to all tonight  Happy holidays to all tonight
